headline: Clear calendar and no inbound comms — use today to push forward the two active Evals UX tickets before the next bi-weekly review cycle.

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credential issues so tomorrow's brief has live metrics
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are failing auth; you're flying blind on escalations and adoption data

quick_wins.task: Triage AE-1079: outline the 'no ground truth' design doc scope and acceptance criteria
quick_wins.why: It's still in To Do with no due date — a 20-min scoping pass moves it to actionable

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: In Progress, Major priority, and directly supports the Evals key deliverable in the Agents Big Rock; no due date means it risks drifting

must_make_progress.task: Draft or outline the 'Generated evaluations — no ground truth' design doc (AE-1079)
must_make_progress.why: Evals adoption is a key OKR pillar; clarifying the no-ground-truth path unblocks engineering and aligns with 26.4+ deliverables

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on AE-744 UX direction and whether no-ground-truth design (AE-1079) has dependencies on Context Engineering or Memory work
Check if any field feedback or customer asks are pending around Evals UX that should shape AE-744

must_report_status.via: Confluence update or async Slack post
must_report_status.note: Next bi-weekly TR will expect an update; prep status now so you're not scrambling

flags: Salesforce integration auth is failing — you have zero visibility on customer escalations. Fix today or escalate to IT.
Snowflake metrics connection is down (empty password). No adoption or funnel data until resolved.
Both active Jira tickets have no due dates set — consider adding target dates to create accountability.
No emails, Slack mentions, or calendar for 16h+ — unusually quiet; confirm nothing is stuck in a channel you're not monitoring.

outcomes.business_impact: No measurable business impact yet today — priority is restoring visibility (Salesforce/Snowflake) and advancing Evals UX which directly supports the Agents Big Rock OKR.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption data unavailable due to broken Snowflake connection; advancing AE-744 and AE-1079 are the primary levers to improve evaluator UX and drive adoption in 26.4+.

slack_summary: Empty calendar and no inbound messages — a rare deep-work day. Top priorities: push AE-744 (Evals UX, Major) forward and scope the no-ground-truth design doc (AE-1079). Also fix Salesforce and Snowflake auth so you're not blind on escalations and metrics. Zero meetings today.
